steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The goal asks for “provide an example of a particle physicist whose research focuses on neutrinos.” Success requires both a specific physicist's name and clear evidence that neutrinos are central to their research.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice C names Francis Halzen and directly connects him to neutrino research through his discovery of high-energy astrophysical neutrinos. The other choices discuss particle physicists and neutrinos in general terms without naming the specific researcher. That matches choice C — C is correct.
